name: Orange Freeze Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve gelatin in boiling orange juice.
2. Add ice cream by spoonfuls, blending until dissolved.
3. Chill until slightly thickened.
4. Stir in mandarin oranges.
5. Fold in whipped topping.
6. Pour into pie shell.
7. Freeze until firm, about 2 hours.
8. Remove from freezer for 15 minutes before serving.
Serves 8.
